findings.evidence: `rg` hits: `TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/Prod.lean:236:lemma prod_tames ... (ω₁.prod ω₂).Tames (J₁.prod J₂)` and `TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/JHolomorphicEnergy.lean:114:lemma stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_eq_zero_iff ... ω.stdComplexLineEnergyDensity J F = 0 ↔ F = 0`.
findings.fix: Replace the proof with `SymplecticForm.prod_tames h₁ h₂` and `SymplecticForm.stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_eq_zero_iff`, followed by the standard `LinearMap.prod` zero/extensionality simplification; remove the lemma if that simp form is already enough at call sites.
findings.issue: `prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_prod_eq_zero_iff` reproves product nondegeneracy instead of reusing the existing product tameness plus general zero-energy API.

findings.evidence: `rg` hits show the wrapper proof is just `SymplecticForm.prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity` at lines 332 and 340; the existing general lemma is at line 167.
findings.fix: Drop this arbitrary-`fderiv` wrapper and use `SymplecticForm.prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity` directly at call sites.
findings.issue: `fderiv_prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity` is only the generic linear product split applied to `(fderiv ℝ u x).toLinearMap`, creating a parallel derivative API with no derivative-specific content.

findings.evidence: `rg` hits show the wrapper proof is just `SymplecticForm.prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity` at lines 457 and 465; the existing general lemma is at line 167.
findings.fix: Drop this arbitrary-`fderivWithin` wrapper and use `SymplecticForm.prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity` directly at call sites.
findings.issue: `fderivWithin_prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity` duplicates the same generic linear product split for `(fderivWithin ℝ u s x).toLinearMap`.

summary: The product energy split itself appears new, but several added corollaries duplicate existing general API after only instantiating it.
